channel.title: The Sentinel Review — National Security Feed
channel.description: Automated national security news aggregation. Updated every 8 hours.

item.title: 📍 Silicon Valley’s Bad Bet on the Gulf | Foreign Affairs
item.description: Why the AI build-out was doomed from the start.

item.title: 🌏 The Real Problem With Global Trade | Foreign Affairs
item.description: How China’s currency manipulation is warping the world economy.

item.title: 🕵️ A national-security asset, filed under ‘finance’ | ASPI Strategist
item.description: Once just a marketplace, the financial system is now a weapon of statecraft. Australia’s financial regulators hold the data that shows where the country is most exposed. That intelligence is a national-security asset but sits ...

item.title: 🌏 Xi Jinping’s Visit to Pyongyang: Regional Roundup | 38 North
item.description: Stimson experts weigh in on Chinese President Xi Jinping’s June 8-9 visit to North Korea ... The post Xi Jinping’s Visit to Pyongyang: Regional Roundup appeared first on 38 North.

item.title: 📍 Leading bipartisan lawmakers on how to achieve US energy ‘dominance’ | Atlantic Council
item.description: At the 2026 Global Energy Forum, lawmakers leading the charge on US energy security discussed their efforts and the role that allies can play. The post Leading bipartisan lawmakers on how to achieve US energy ‘dominance’ appeared first on Atlantic Council.

item.title: 🏴 Europe’s route out of this energy crisis, as mapped by Cyprus and Greece | Atlantic Council
item.description: At the 2026 Global Energy Forum, Greece's Stavros Papastavrou and Cyprus’s Michael Damianos outlined how the energy system is reshaping around the Eastern Mediterranean. The post Europe’s route out of this energy crisis, as mapped by Cyprus and Greece appeared first on Atlantic…

item.title: 📍 Somalia’s Fragile Government May Be on the Verge of Collapse | Foreign Policy
item.description: After disputes culminated in fighting last week, the country’s political system is in doubt.

item.title: 📍 Boeing’s New Larger Ghost Bat Can Carry AIM-120 AMRAAMs Internally | The War Zone
item.description: The stealthy Ghost Bat is heading into its third iteration, with larger wings, more power, and internal weapons bays. The post Boeing’s New Larger Ghost Bat Can Carry AIM-120 AMRAAMs Internally appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 🌍 Trump Says More Strikes on Iran Are Coming | Foreign Policy
item.description: Tehran will “pay the price” for stalling negotiations, the U.S. president warned.

item.title: 📍 Increasing defense spending isn’t enough. The US and its allies must also guarantee interoperability. | Atlantic Council
item.description: Rising defense spending is creating a generational opportunity. But allied interoperability should be built into these new systems from the start. The post Increasing defense spending isn’t enough. The US and its allies must also guarantee interoperability. appeared first on…

item.title: 🏴 The future of NATO’s deterrence in the air domain | Atlantic Council
item.description: European NATO member states need to prepare to deter, and if necessary, defeat Russia—with less US support. When it comes to airpower, here are the actions European states need to take in the short, medium, and long term. The post The future of NATO’s deterrence in the air…

item.title: 🌍 Overnight Attacks Rattle U.S.-Iran Ceasefire (Updated) | The War Zone
item.description: The latest round of tit-for-tat attacks between the U.S. and Iran are among the most severe since a ceasefire was reached on April 8. The post Overnight Attacks Rattle U.S.-Iran Ceasefire (Updated) appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 📍 CCA showdown and FCAS fallout, as Berlin Air Show gets underway | Breaking Defense
item.description: Catch what’s new on the first day of the sprawling defense expo outside the German capital.

item.title: 📍 Darwin Dialogue 2026: the conversation is over. It’s time for implementation | ASPI Strategist
item.description: Today marks the launch of the Darwin Dialogue 2026 report, From Exposure to Endurance: competitive endurance architecture for high-ESG mineral-specific supply chains. Australia and its partners have spent much of the past decade debating why ...

item.title: 🌍 Diagnosing the Israeli-Palestinian Conflict Doesn’t Solve It | Foreign Policy
item.description: Two new books offer fresh explanations for what went wrong—but little on how to make it go right.

item.title: 🌍 ‘They got very lucky,’ Trump says of downed Apache helicopter’s crew | Defense News
item.description: After a U.S. Army Apache helicopter was downed by an Iranian drone, President Donald Trump said the rescued aviators “got very lucky.”

item.title: 🏛️ US Navy stands up naval support activity in Western Australia | Defense News
item.description: As part of the AUKUS security pact, NSA Stirling will provide support for personnel assigned to Submarine Rotational Force-West.

item.title: 🌍 From a gap to a chasm: Diverging US and Israeli interests in the war with Iran | Atlantic Council
item.description: The once-modest gap between Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and US President Donald Trump has widened in recent weeks. The post From a gap to a chasm: Diverging US and Israeli interests in the war with Iran appeared first on Atlantic Council.

item.title: 🏛️ US Army astronaut tapped for NASA’s Artemis III mission | Defense News
item.description: The U.S. Army is launching into space again by way of Col. Frank Rubio, who will be part of the 2027 Artemis III mission, NASA announced Tuesday.

item.title: 🕵️ Is This Secretive Air Force 737 About To Become NASA’s Next ‘Vomit Comet’? | The War Zone
item.description: NASA wants to hire a very specialized company to see if a "classified" Air Force 737 could be used as a testbed for low-gravity work. The post Is This Secretive Air Force 737 About To Become NASA’s Next ‘Vomit Comet’? appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 📍 LeoLab’s new, mobile space-watch radar to participate in Valiant Shield exercise | Breaking Defense
item.description: The new Scout-S radar will remain operational after Valiant Shield ends July 1, and already is contributing data to LeoLab’s space monitoring network, the company said.

item.title: 📍 How energy could redefine the US role in the Western Balkans | Atlantic Council
item.description: A new report from the Trump administration redefines the US goal as effectively being “stability … as a means of pursuing economic cooperation.” The post How energy could redefine the US role in the Western Balkans appeared first on Atlantic Council.

item.title: 🏛️ Qatari-donated Air Force One now sports red, white and blue paint job | Defense News
item.description: The interim Air Force One VC-25B Bridge aircraft is undergoing its final modifications ahead of a summer rollout.

item.title: 📍 ICEYE, Rheinmetall form German joint venture for space-based ISR | Breaking Defense
item.description: The new venture, Rheinmetall ICEYE Space Solutions, includes four German space startups as “initial” partners.

item.title: ⚛️ Germany’s Cobra 600 Is A Jet Powered Interceptor Drone That Slings An IRIS-T Missile | The War Zone
item.description: The Cobra 600 carries the missile hundreds of miles from its runway launch point, extending the reach of surface-to-air missile batteries. The post Germany’s Cobra 600 Is A Jet Powered Interceptor Drone That Slings An IRIS-T Missile appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 🏴 Europe Plans to Crack Down on Russia—but for Real This Time | Foreign Policy
item.description: Trump and the Iran war gave Russia a boost. Brussels is fed up.

item.title: 📍 The Geopolitics of the World Cup | Foreign Policy
item.description: How immigration, trade, and conflict are overshadowing soccer.

item.title: 📍 Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions | Just Security
item.description: A public resource tracking all the legal challenges to the Trump administration's executive orders and actions. The post Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions appeared first on Just Security.

item.title: 📍 House appropriators release $1 trillion defense bill for FY27 | Breaking Defense
item.description: The bill also restores funding for the E-7 Wedgetail after Defense Department leaders signaled their intent to continue the program.

item.title: 🕵️ Why the India-Oman CEPA is Special | The Diplomat
item.description: Much of Oman’s coastline lies outside the Strait of Hormuz. With CEPA kicking in on June 1, India will be looking to benefit from the agreement and Oman’s geography.
